account_id.description: Harness account identifier; scopes every NextGen read via the accountIdentifier query parameter.

api_key.description: Harness NextGen API key, sent as the x-api-key header. Never logged.

base_url.description: Harness platform API base URL override for tests, self-managed instances, or proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
